title: Marketplace Manager - The Man Company - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - The Man Company - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!
